contents: Require Import Basics.Trunc Types.Sigma HoTT.Tactics Types.Forall.
Context `{HF : forall C D, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)}.
Hypothesis has_op : forall C : cat, P C.1^op.

Definition opposite_functor : Functor cat cat
    := Build_Functor
         cat cat
         (fun C => (C.1^op; has_op _))
         (fun _ _ F => F^op)%functor
         (fun _ _ _ _ _ => idpath)
         (fun _ => idpath).

hypotheses.type: forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)

hypotheses.body: sub_pre_cat P

fun x : cat =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
  path_ishprop
    (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1)
       (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)).2)
    x.2)
hypotheses.type:
forall x : cat,
(((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) = x
forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)

hypotheses.body: sub_pre_cat P

fun x : cat =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
  path_ishprop
    (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1)
       (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)).2)
    x.2)
hypotheses.type:
forall x : cat,
(((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) = x

goals.conclusion:
{HO
: (fun c : {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
   (((c.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((c.1)^op%category; has_op c))) =
  idmap
&
transport
  (fun GO : {C : PreCategory & P C} -> {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
   forall s d : {C : PreCategory & P C},
   Functor s.1 d.1 -> Functor (GO s).1 (GO d).1)
  HO (fun (s d : {C : PreCategory & P C}) (m : Functor s.1 d.1) => (m^op)^op) =
(fun s d : {C : PreCategory & P C} => idmap)}

hypotheses.type: forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)

hypotheses.body: sub_pre_cat P

fun x : cat =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
  path_ishprop
    (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1)
       (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)).2)
    x.2)
hypotheses.type:
forall x : cat,
(((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) = x

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun GO : {C : PreCategory & P C} -> {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
   forall s d : {C : PreCategory & P C},
   Functor s.1 d.1 -> Functor (GO s).1 (GO d).1)
  (path_forall
     (fun x : cat =>
      (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)))
     idmap opposite_functor_involutive_helper)
  (fun (s d : {C : PreCategory & P C}) (m : Functor s.1 d.1) => (m^op)^op) =
(fun s d : {C : PreCategory & P C} => idmap)

hypotheses.type: forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)

hypotheses.body: sub_pre_cat P

fun x : cat =>

  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun GO : {C : PreCategory & P C} -> {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
   forall s d : {C : PreCategory & P C},
   Functor s.1 d.1 -> Functor (GO s).1 (GO d).1)
  (path_forall
     (fun x2 : cat =>
      (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)))
     idmap opposite_functor_involutive_helper)
  (fun (s d : {C : PreCategory & P C}) (m : Functor s.1 d.1) => (m^op)^op) x
  x0 x1 =
x1

path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1;
  path_ishprop

       (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)).2)

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun x2 : {C : PreCategory & P C} -> {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
   Functor (x2 x).1 (x2 x0).1)
  (path_forall
     (fun x2 : cat =>
      (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)))
     idmap opposite_functor_involutive_helper)
  (x1^op)^op =
x1

hypotheses.type: forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)

hypotheses.body: sub_pre_cat P

fun x2 : cat =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2

  path_ishprop
    (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1)
       (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)).2)

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun y : {C : PreCategory & P C} => Functor x.1 y.1)
  (opposite_functor_involutive_helper x0)
  (transport
     (fun y : {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
      Functor y.1
        (((x0.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x0.1)^op%category; has_op x0)).1)
     (opposite_functor_involutive_helper x) (x1^op)^op) =
x1

fun x2 : cat =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1;
  path_ishprop
    (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1)
       (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)).2)

forall x2 : cat,
(((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) = x2

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun y : {C : PreCategory & P C} => Functor x.1 y.1)
  (path_sigma_uncurried P
     (((x0.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x0.1)^op%category; has_op x0)) x0
     (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x0.1;
     path_ishprop
       (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x0.1)
          (((x0.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x0.1)^op%category; has_op x0)).2)
       x0.2))
  (transport
     (fun y : {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
      Functor y.1
        (((x0.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x0.1)^op%category; has_op x0)).1)
     (path_sigma_uncurried P
        (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
        (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
        path_ishprop
          (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1)
             (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)).2)
          x.2))
     (x1^op)^op) =
x1

fun x2 : cat =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2

  path_ishprop

forall x2 : cat,
(((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) = x2

goals.conclusion:
transport (Functor x.1)
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x0.1;
  path_ishprop
    (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x0.1)
       (((x0.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x0.1)^op%category; has_op x0)).2)
    x0.2).1
  (transport
     (fun y : {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
      Functor y.1
        (((x0.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x0.1)^op%category; has_op x0)).1)
     (path_sigma_uncurried P
        (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
        (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
        path_ishprop
          (transport P (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1)
             (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)).2)
          x.2))
     (x1^op)^op) =
x1

path_sigma_uncurried P

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun y : {C : PreCategory & P C} => Functor y.1 ((x0.1)^op)^op)
  (path_sigma_uncurried P
     (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
     (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
     path_ishprop (has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x.2))
  (x1^op)^op =
x1

hypotheses.body: sub_pre_cat P

hypotheses.type: forall C : {C : PreCategory & P C}, P (C.1)^op

hypotheses.body:
fun x2 : {C : PreCategory & P C} =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1;
  path_ishprop (has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2.2)
hypotheses.type:
forall x2 : {C : PreCategory & P C},
(((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) = x2

contents: repeat progress change (fun x => ?f x) with f in *.

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun y : {x : _ & P x} => Functor y.1 ((x0.1)^op)^op)
  (path_sigma_uncurried P
     (((x.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x
     (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
     path_ishprop (has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x.2))
  (x1^op)^op =
x1

  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2

hypotheses.type:

contents:
match goal with
      | [ |- context[transport
                          (fun x' => ?f x'.1 ?y)
                          (@path_sigma_uncurried ?A ?P ?u ?v ?pq)] ]
        => rewrite (@transport_pr1_path_sigma_uncurried
                      A P u v pq
                      (fun x => f x y))
    end.

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x2 : PreCategory => Functor x2 ((x0.1)^op)^op)
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x.1;
  path_ishprop (has_op ((x.1)^op%category; has_op x)) x.2).1 
  (x1^op)^op =
x1

  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1;
  path_ishprop (has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2.2)
hypotheses.type:
forall x2 : {x : _ & P x},

hypotheses.body:
fun x2 : {x : _ & P x} =>
path_sigma_uncurried P
  (((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2
  (Category.Dual.opposite_involutive x2.1;
  path_ishprop (has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) x2.2)
hypotheses.type:
forall x2 : {x : _ & P x},
(((x2.1)^op)^op%category; has_op ((x2.1)^op%category; has_op x2)) = x2
forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)
forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)
forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)

forall s d : proj0,
morphism proj0 s d -> morphism proj1 (object_of s) (object_of d)

forall (s d d' : proj0) (m1 : morphism proj0 s d) 
(m2 : morphism proj0 d d'),
morphism_of s d' (m2 o m1)%morphism =
(morphism_of d d' m2 o morphism_of s d m1)%morphism
forall x : proj0, morphism_of x x 1%morphism = 1%morphism
forall C D : PreCategory, P C -> P D -> IsHSet (Functor C D)
forall x : object0, morphism0 x x
forall s d d' : object0, morphism0 d d' -> morphism0 s d -> morphism0 s d'

forall (x1 x2 x3 x4 : object0) (m1 : morphism0 x1 x2) 
(m2 : morphism0 x2 x3) (m3 : morphism0 x3 x4),
compose0 x1 x2 x4 (compose0 x2 x3 x4 m3 m2) m1 =
compose0 x1 x3 x4 m3 (compose0 x1 x2 x3 m2 m1)

forall (x1 x2 x3 x4 : object0) (m1 : morphism0 x1 x2) 
(m2 : morphism0 x2 x3) (m3 : morphism0 x3 x4),
compose0 x1 x3 x4 m3 (compose0 x1 x2 x3 m2 m1) =
compose0 x1 x2 x4 (compose0 x2 x3 x4 m3 m2) m1

forall (a b : object0) (f : morphism0 a b),
compose0 a b b (identity0 b) f = f

forall (a b : object0) (f : morphism0 a b),
compose0 a a b f (identity0 a) = f
forall x : object0, compose0 x x x (identity0 x) (identity0 x) = identity0 x
forall s d : object0, IsHSet (morphism0 s d)
forall x : object, morphism x x
forall s d d' : object, morphism d d' -> morphism s d -> morphism s d'

forall (x1 x2 x3 x4 : object) (m1 : morphism x1 x2) 
(m2 : morphism x2 x3) (m3 : morphism x3 x4),
compose x1 x2 x4 (compose x2 x3 x4 m3 m2) m1 =
compose x1 x3 x4 m3 (compose x1 x2 x3 m2 m1)

forall (x1 x2 x3 x4 : object) (m1 : morphism x1 x2) 
(m2 : morphism x2 x3) (m3 : morphism x3 x4),
compose x1 x3 x4 m3 (compose x1 x2 x3 m2 m1) =
compose x1 x2 x4 (compose x2 x3 x4 m3 m2) m1
forall (a b : object) (f : morphism a b), compose a b b (identity b) f = f
forall (a b : object) (f : morphism a b), compose a a b f (identity a) = f
forall x : object, compose x x x (identity x) (identity x) = identity x
forall s d : object, IsHSet (morphism s d)
forall s d : object0, morphism0 s d -> morphism (object_of s) (object_of d)

forall (s d d' : object0) (m1 : morphism0 s d) (m2 : morphism0 d d'),
morphism_of s d' (compose0 s d d' m2 m1) =
compose (object_of s) (object_of d) (object_of d') 
  (morphism_of d d' m2) (morphism_of s d m1)
forall x : object0, morphism_of x x (identity0 x) = identity (object_of x)
